response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the retrieved record, search matches, and saved preferences as distinct findings.
Label requested information as unknown when the tools do not return it.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call commerce_get, commerce_search, and commerce_profile together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the purchasing status brief, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: retrieve com-226; search Boise for "New-Hire Equipment Order"; and load the saved operational preferences. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Use only returned fields; label any requested field the tools omit as unknown.
